title: Create siwe-verify Supabase Edge Function
description: Write and deploy the siwe-verify Edge Function. It verifies the wallet signature, validates the nonce, creates or retrieves the Supabase user for the wallet address, and returns a session.
acceptance_criteria: Accepts POST with body { message: string, signature: string, address: string }
Verifies the signature recovers to the claimed address
Retrieves the nonce from siwe_nonces, checks it is not expired and not used
Marks the nonce as used (or deletes it)
Looks up a user with email [address]@wallet.flatfinder.app via admin API
If no user found: creates one with createUser({ email, email_confirm: true })
Generates a sign-in link for the user via generateLink({ type: 'magiclink', email })
Returns the link token so the frontend can exchange it via /auth/callback
Returns 400 for invalid signature or expired/used nonce

steps.description: Find or create user, generate session link

steps.details:
supabase functions deploy siwe-verify
Test with a valid signature from MetaMask dev tools or a test script using ethers.js to sign the message from TASK-035.

technical_notes: listUsers() can be slow at scale — in production replace with a direct profiles lookup by wallet_address to avoid iterating all users. The action_link from generateLink is a one-time URL; the frontend navigates to it which lands on /auth/callback and establishes the session.
